writing_tasks.title: Writing Task 2 — Education and exams
writing_tasks.prompt:
Some people believe that schools should reduce the number of exams and assess students through projects and classroom performance instead. Others think exams remain the fairest way to measure academic ability.

Discuss both views and give your own opinion.

Write at least 250 words.

writing_tasks.title: Writing Task 2 — Technology and attention
writing_tasks.prompt:
Many people say that smartphones and social media have made it harder for young people to concentrate for long periods. Others argue that digital tools simply require a different kind of attention.

Discuss both views and give your own opinion.

Write at least 250 words.

writing_tasks.title: Writing Task 2 — Environment and responsibility
writing_tasks.prompt:
Some people think that individuals can do little to solve environmental problems, and that governments and large companies must take the lead. To what extent do you agree or disagree?

Write at least 250 words.

writing_tasks.title: Writing Task 2 — Remote work
writing_tasks.prompt:
In many jobs, working from home has become more common. Some people believe this improves quality of life, while others think it weakens teamwork and professional development.

Discuss both views and give your own opinion.

Write at least 250 words.

writing_tasks.title: Writing Task 2 — Cities and public space
writing_tasks.prompt:
Some cities are replacing parks and public squares with housing, roads, and commercial buildings. Do the advantages of this development outweigh the disadvantages?

Write at least 250 words.

writing_tasks.title: Writing Task 2 — Health and lifestyle
writing_tasks.prompt:
Many governments spend large amounts of money treating illnesses, but some people argue that more money should be spent on preventing health problems through education and public facilities.

To what extent do you agree or disagree?

Write at least 250 words.

writing_tasks.title: Writing Task 2 — Crime and rehabilitation
writing_tasks.prompt:
Some people believe that prisons should focus mainly on punishment, while others think the main purpose should be rehabilitation and helping offenders return to society.

Discuss both views and give your own opinion.

Write at least 250 words.

writing_tasks.title: Writing Task 2 — Culture and tourism
writing_tasks.prompt:
International tourism can bring money and jobs to local communities, but it can also damage traditional culture and the environment.

Do the benefits of international tourism outweigh the drawbacks?

Write at least 250 words.

writing_tasks.title: Writing Task 2 — Artificial intelligence
writing_tasks.prompt:
Some people believe that artificial intelligence will create more opportunities than problems. Others think it will cause serious risks for employment and society.

Discuss both views and give your own opinion.

Write at least 250 words.

writing_tasks.title: Writing Task 2 — Public transport
writing_tasks.prompt:
Some people think governments should make public transport free in order to reduce traffic and pollution. Others believe this would be too expensive and ineffective.

Discuss both views and give your own opinion.

Write at least 250 words.

writing_tasks.title: Writing Task 2 — Online learning
writing_tasks.prompt:
Online courses are becoming increasingly popular. Some people think they are as effective as traditional classroom learning, while others believe face-to-face education is still better.

Discuss both views and give your own opinion.

Write at least 250 words.

writing_tasks.title: Writing Task 2 — Consumer society
writing_tasks.prompt:
In many countries, people are buying more goods than ever before. Some people see this as a sign of economic success, while others believe it creates waste and dissatisfaction.

Discuss both views and give your own opinion.

Write at least 250 words.
